Teacher.title: Teacher
Teacher.description: Represents a teacher using the Monitor do BEEM application, responsible for creating classes, evaluating students, and planning lessons.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Teacher entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the teacher.

lastName.description: The last name of the teacher.

email.description: The email address of the teacher, used for communication.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the teacher record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the teacher record was last updated.

Class.title: Class
Class.description: Represents a class or group of students managed by one or more teachers.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Class entity.

name.description: The name of the class (e.g., '5th Grade Math A').

description.description: A brief description of the class.

teacherIds.description: References to Teacher entities who teach this class. (Relationship: Teacher N:N Class)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the class record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the class record was last updated.

Student.title: Student
Student.description: Represents a student enrolled in one or more classes.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Student entity.

firstName.description: The first name of the student.

lastName.description: The last name of the student.

email.description: The email address of the student (optional for younger students).

dateOfBirth.description: The date of birth of the student.

enrollmentDate.description: The date when the student was first enrolled.

classIds.description: References to Class entities the student is enrolled in. (Relationship: Student N:N Class)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the student record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the student record was last updated.

Competency.title: Competency
Competency.description: Represents a broad area of knowledge or skill students are expected to acquire, aligned with a specific subject.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Competency entity.

name.description: The name of the competency (e.g., 'Leitura e Interpretação de Texto', 'Resolução de Problemas').

description.description: A detailed description of what the competency entails.

subject.description: The subject associated with this competency (e.g., 'Português', 'Matemática').

Skill.title: Skill
Skill.description: Represents a specific, measurable ability or action nested under a broader competency.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Skill entity.

name.description: The name of the skill (e.g., 'Identificar ideia principal', 'Calcular percentagens').

description.description: A detailed description of the specific skill.

competencyId.description: Reference to the Competency this skill belongs to. (Relationship: Competency 1:N Skill)

BloomTaxonomyLevel.title: BloomTaxonomyLevel
BloomTaxonomyLevel.description: Represents a cognitive level from Bloom's Taxonomy, used to categorize assessment results.

id.description: Unique identifier for the BloomTaxonomyLevel entity.

name.description: The name of the Bloom's Taxonomy level (e.g., 'Remember', 'Understand', 'Apply', 'Analyze', 'Evaluate', 'Create').

description.description: A description of the cognitive processes involved at this level.

order.description: The numerical order of the level in Bloom's Taxonomy hierarchy (e.g., 1 for Remember, 6 for Create).

AssessmentResult.title: AssessmentResult
AssessmentResult.description: Records a student's performance on a specific competency or skill, categorized by Bloom's Taxonomy.

id.description: Unique identifier for the AssessmentResult entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student being assessed. (Relationship: Student 1:N AssessmentResult)

classId.description: Reference to the Class in which the assessment was conducted. (Relationship: Class 1:N AssessmentResult)

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher who conducted the assessment. (Relationship: Teacher 1:N AssessmentResult)

competencyId.description: Reference to the Competency being assessed. (Relationship: Competency 1:N AssessmentResult)

skillId.description: Optional reference to the specific Skill being assessed within the competency. (Relationship: Skill 1:N AssessmentResult)

bloomTaxonomyLevelId.description: Reference to the BloomTaxonomyLevel achieved or targeted in this assessment. (Relationship: BloomTaxonomyLevel 1:N AssessmentResult)

score.description: The numerical score or grade obtained by the student in this assessment.

feedback.description: Qualitative feedback provided for the assessment result.

assessmentDate.description: The date and time when the assessment was conducted.

Attendance.title: Attendance
Attendance.description: Records a student's attendance status for a specific class on a given date.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Attendance entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student for whom attendance is recorded. (Relationship: Student 1:N Attendance)

classId.description: Reference to the Class for which attendance is recorded. (Relationship: Class 1:N Attendance)

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher who recorded the attendance. (Relationship: Teacher 1:N Attendance)

date.description: The date for which the attendance is recorded.

notes.description: Any additional notes regarding the attendance record.

Observation.title: Observation
Observation.description: Stores qualitative notes and observations made by a teacher about a student's behavior or progress.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Observation entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student who is the subject of the observation. (Relationship: Student 1:N Observation)

classId.description: Reference to the Class context of the observation. (Relationship: Class 1:N Observation)

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher who made the observation. (Relationship: Teacher 1:N Observation)

date.description: The date and time when the observation was made.

content.description: The detailed qualitative notes of the observation.

LearningInsight.title: LearningInsight
LearningInsight.description: Stores AI-generated insights, summaries, and personalized learning suggestions for students.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningInsight entity.

studentId.description: Reference to the Student for whom the insight was generated. (Relationship: Student 1:N LearningInsight)

classId.description: Reference to the Class context for the insight. (Relationship: Class 1:N LearningInsight)

generatedDate.description: The date and time when the learning insight was generated.

summary.description: An AI-generated summary of the student's progress and performance.

suggestions.description: AI-generated personalized learning suggestions for the student.

LearningContent.title: LearningContent
LearningContent.description: Represents educational materials or resources that can be associated with lessons or schedule entries.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LearningContent entity.

title.description: The title of the learning content.

description.description: A brief description of the learning content.

url.description: The URL if the content is an external link or hosted online.

filePath.description: A reference to the file path if the content is stored internally.

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher who created or uploaded this content. (Relationship: Teacher 1:N LearningContent)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the content record was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the content record was last updated.

ScheduleEntry.title: ScheduleEntry
ScheduleEntry.description: Represents an entry in a class calendar, such as a lesson, exam, or event, with associated learning content.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ScheduleEntry entity.

classId.description: Reference to the Class this schedule entry belongs to. (Relationship: Class 1:N ScheduleEntry)

teacherId.description: Reference to the Teacher responsible for this schedule entry. (Relationship: Teacher 1:N ScheduleEntry)

title.description: The title of the schedule entry (e.g., 'Aula de Matemática', 'Prova de Português').

description.description: A detailed description of the schedule entry.

startDate.description: The start date and time of the schedule entry.

endDate.description: The end date and time of the schedule entry.

learningContentIds.description: References to LearningContent entities associated with this schedule entry. (Relationship: LearningContent N:N ScheduleEntry)

definition.description: Stores individual teacher profiles. The `teacherId` should correspond to `request.auth.uid`. This collection serves as the primary role collection for 'Teacher' users.

Stores details for each class. Documents include a `teacherIds` array (Membership Map) for all teachers assigned to this class. This array is denormalized into subcollection documents to ensure Authorization Independence.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific class.

definition.description: Stores the core profile information for each student. Documents include `associatedTeacherIds` (denormalized array of `teacherIds` from all classes the student is in) for Authorization Independence, enabling direct access for authorized teachers. Requires Cloud Function maintenance for `associatedTeacherIds` sync.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific student.

definition.description: Represents a student's enrollment in a specific class. Documents include denormalized `classTeacherIds` from the parent `Class` document for Authorization Independence. Contains minimal student details for class context (e.g., studentId, firstName, lastName).

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent class.

params.name: studentId
params.description: The unique identifier for the enrolled student within this class.

definition.description: Global collection of predefined competencies. This data is read-only for all authenticated teachers.
Global subcollection of specific skills, nested under their respective competencies. This data is read-only for all authenticated teachers.

params.name: competencyId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent competency.

params.name: skillId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific skill.

definition.description: Global collection of Bloom's Taxonomy levels. This data is read-only for all authenticated teachers.

Records a student's performance on competencies/skills within a specific class. Documents include `classId`, `studentId`, `teacherId` (assessor) and denormalized `classTeacherIds` (from parent `Class`) for Authorization Independence.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent class.

params.name: assessmentResultId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific assessment result.

definition.description: Records student attendance for a specific class. Documents include `classId`, `studentId`, `teacherId` (recorder) and denormalized `classTeacherIds` (from parent `Class`) for Authorization Independence.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent class.

params.name: attendanceId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific attendance record.

definition.description: Stores qualitative observations made by teachers about students in a specific class context. Documents include `classId`, `studentId`, `teacherId` (observer) and denormalized `classTeacherIds` (from parent `Class`) for Authorization Independence.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent class.

params.name: observationId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific observation.

definition.description: Stores AI-generated learning insights for students within a class context. Documents include `classId`, `studentId` and denormalized `classTeacherIds` (from parent `Class`) for Authorization Independence.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent class.

params.name: learningInsightId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific learning insight.

definition.description: Stores learning materials created and owned by a specific teacher. Access is restricted to the `teacherId` in the path, ensuring Authorization Independence.

params.name: teacherId
params.description: The unique identifier for the teacher who owns this content.

params.name: contentId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific learning content item.

definition.description: Represents calendar entries (lessons, exams, events) for a class. Documents include `classId`, `teacherId` (responsible teacher) and denormalized `classTeacherIds` (from parent `Class`) for Authorization Independence.

params.name: classId
params.description: The unique identifier for the parent class.

params.name: scheduleEntryId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific schedule entry.

firestore.reasoning:
The recommended Firestore structure prioritizes **Authorization Independence** and **QAPs (Rules are not Filters)** by strategically denormalizing authorization contexts. 

**Authorization Independence:**
1.  **Classes and their Subcollections:** The `Class` entity (`/classes/{classId}`) contains a `teacherIds` array, which acts as the membership map for authorized teachers. For all subcollections directly related to a class (e.g., `assessmentResults`, `attendanceRecords`, `observations`, `learningInsights`, `scheduleEntries`, and `enrolledStudents`), the `classTeacherIds` field is denormalized directly into each document. This `classTeacherIds` array is a direct copy of the parent `Class`'s `teacherIds`. This crucial denormalization ensures that Firebase Security Rules can authorize access to any document within these subcollections by checking `request.auth.uid in resource.data.classTeacherIds` without relying on `get()` operations to fetch the parent `Class` document. This guarantees atomic authorization checks and prevents complex rule dependencies that can lead to security vulnerabilities and performance issues.
2.  **Students (Global Profile):** For the top-level `/students/{studentId}` collection, which represents the core student profile, a `associatedTeacherIds` array is denormalized into each `Student` document. This array is a union of all `teacherIds` from every `Class` the student is currently enrolled in. This allows any authorized teacher (i.e., a teacher of any class the student is in) to read and update the student's core profile without needing to perform `get()` operations on multiple `Class` documents. This denormalization requires careful maintenance via Cloud Functions or server-side logic to keep it synchronized whenever student enrollments or class teacher assignments change.
3.  **Teacher-Owned Content:** Learning Content (`/teachers/{teacherId}/learningContent/{contentId}`) is directly owned by a single teacher, so the `teacherId` in the path and within the document is sufficient for Authorization Independence.

**QAPs (Rules are not Filters):**
The denormalization strategy directly supports Query-Allow-Permissions (QAPs). By embedding the necessary authorization UIDs (e.g., `teacherIds`, `classTeacherIds`, `associatedTeacherIds`) directly within the documents, security rules can enforce access control by matching `request.auth.uid` against these fields. This enables efficient and secure `list` operations where client queries can include `where 'teacherIds' array-contains request.auth.uid` (or similar for other denormalized fields). The rules will then only permit reads for documents where the query matches the security rule, preventing data leakage and ensuring that the client only receives data it is authorized to see. This approach avoids using security rules as filters, leading to more predictable performance and simpler, more robust rule logic. 

**Structural Segregation:**
*   `teachers/{teacherId}`: Private teacher profiles.
*   `classes/{classId}`: Collaborative class definitions with explicit teacher assignments.
*   `classes/{classId}/...`: Contextual data (assessments, attendance, observations, insights, enrolled students) tied to specific classes.
*   `students/{studentId}`: Global student profiles, accessible by any teacher associated with the student's classes.
*   `competencies`, `skills`, `bloomTaxonomyLevels`: Global, read-only reference data accessible by all authenticated teachers.
*   `teachers/{teacherId}/learningContent`: Private learning materials owned by individual teachers.

This structure ensures a homogeneous security posture within each collection, simplifying rule writing and enhancing debuggability.
